name: OpenSim Meta Template M0
description: A minimal, archetype-agnostic project skeleton that defines the universal structure required for an OpenSim simulator. Does not assume any numerical archetype, solver class, or visualization shape.

core.description: Universal project foundation copied from agent-test/templates/core/
provides: Universal solver lifecycle (BaseSolver — play / pause / reset / subscribe + RAF accumulator)
simConfig.json — wrapper-format `{ value, type, unit, description }` configuration
Phase-5 numerical validators — NaNDetector, checkUnitConsistency, checkConservation, compareToAnalytic + detectPeriodFromZeroCrossings
Vitest with jsdom environment + coverage hooks

extension.description: Minimal extension interface for archetype specialization

_TemplateSolver.ts.purpose: COPY when starting from M0 with no archetype overlay yet. After classification the agent overlays the archetype's richer scaffold (_TemplateODE.ts, _TemplateAgent.ts, ...).

doesNotAssume: Numerical archetype (ode_system, pde_grid, agent_based, monte_carlo, cellular_automata)
Solver class (RK4, RK45, finite-difference stencil, agent step, sampler, cell update)
State shape (vector / field / agent list / cell grid / sample accumulator)
Whether the system is deterministic or stochastic
Whether the system has a spatial domain

extensionPoints.name: initialState
extensionPoints.description: Return the state at t = 0. Shape is archetype-specific: number[] for ODE, Record<string, Float64Array> for PDE field, Agent[] for agent_based, etc.

extensionPoints.name: step
extensionPoints.description: Advance state by one fixed `dt`. Implemented by archetype-specific concrete integrators (RK4, Laplacian5, etc.) — the meta template just declares the override surface.

extensionPoints.name: simConfig.json
extensionPoints.description: Simulation-specific config fields added via `{ value, type, unit, description }` wrapper. Read in code via `simConfig.<field>.value`.

extensionPoints.name: App.tsx
extensionPoints.description: Lab scene composition. Mount `<BaseLabScene>` and add archetype-specific lab_objects + visualization + instruments bound to simConfig fields.

extensionPoints.name: validators/
extensionPoints.description: Phase-6 test file (`src/test/validation.test.ts`) imports the four validator helpers and asserts NaN propagation, unit consistency, conservation drift, and analytic baseline targets.
